notes: Maharshi-Pandya's contemplative-reasoning system prompt — a Jan 2025 snapshot advocating stream-of-consciousness LLM thinking with a <contemplator> tag and 10k-char minimum. Creator View frames it as a historical artifact whose 'exploration-over-conclusion' principle still maps to brainstorm/convergence-loop design (K1 = cas-relevant + jason-os-relevant), while the tag pattern itself (K2) is superseded by Claude native thinking and extended-reasoning models.
